title: psychotria tsimihetensis
intro: Psychotria tsimihetensis, also known as Madagascar king, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Psychotria tsimihetensis include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and astringent. Herbal preparations of Psychotria tsimihetensis can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in tinctures and ointments.
